title: clerodendrum balfourii
intro: Clerodendrum balfourii, also known as the Balfour's glorybower, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum balfourii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
